---
title: "rigid_exp"
generated: true
description: "Homogeneous rigid transform from its Lie parameters."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.transform`](../nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:rigid_exp -->
```python
rigid_exp(params: Float[Array, '... p'], *, ndim: int) -> Float[Array, '... d1 d1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:rigid_exp -->
Homogeneous rigid transform from its Lie parameters.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:rigid_exp -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `params` | `Float` | `...` × `p` | — | `(..., p)` with `p = 3` for `ndim == 2` ($\theta, t_x, t_y$) or `p = 6` for `ndim == 3` ($\omega_x, \omega_y, \omega_z, t_x, t_y, t_z$). $\omega$ is the axis-angle rotation vector; the translation is applied directly. |
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | Spatial dimensionality (2 or 3). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `d1` × `d1`. Homogeneous matrix, `(..., ndim + 1, ndim + 1)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:rigid_exp -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
